title: aeschynomene histrix var. mucronulata
intro: Aeschynomene histrix var. mucronulata, also known as the spiny sensitive plant, is a plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to tropical Africa and Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Aeschynomene histrix var. mucronulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used for its medicinal purposes.
